description: §41.14.5 — pick=["X", ...] on <formFor for=T> naming a field not present on struct T fires E-FORMFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD. Signup has { name, email, agree }; pick=["nope"] names a non-field.
rationale: §41.14.5 E-FORMFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD: the pick=[...] attribute SHALL name only declared struct fields; an unknown name is rejected. Fix: correct or remove the invalid field name from the pick array.
